# CWE-76 negative: full HTML escaping for output context
lang: go
file: CWE-76-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"html"
	"net/http"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

// CWE-76 Improper Neutralization of Equivalent Special Elements (mitigated)
func RenderSnippet(c *gin.Context) {
	raw := c.PostForm("snippet")
	safe := html.EscapeString(raw)
	c.Data(http.StatusOK, "text/html; charset=utf-8", []byte("<section>"+safe+"</section>"))
}
